title: George Hill (rugby league)
extract:
George Hill (born 29 July 2004) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a loose forward or hooker for the Keighley Cougars in the RFL Championship, on a season-long loan from the Castleford Tigers in the Super League.
He has previously spent time on loan or dual registration from Castleford at Whitehaven and the Batley Bulldogs in the Championship, and at the Salford Red Devils in the Super League.
